name: React Hook Patterns
description: Common React hook patterns for detection and suggestion

patterns.name: useState Batching
patterns.description: Multiple related setState calls should use useReducer or a single state object to avoid intermediate renders.

patterns.name: useCallback with Dependencies
patterns.description: useCallback should have correct dependency array. Functions passed to child components should be memoized.

patterns.name: useMemo for Expensive Computation
patterns.description: useMemo should be used for expensive computations, not for every variable. Profile before memoizing.

patterns.name: useRef Patterns
patterns.description: useRef for DOM access, mutable values that don't trigger re-renders, and previous value tracking.

patterns.name: useEffect Data Fetching
patterns.description: Data fetching in useEffect with abort controller, loading state, and error handling.

patterns.name: useDebounce Hook
patterns.description: Debounce a value to limit update frequency. Common for search inputs and API calls.

patterns.name: useLocalStorage Hook
patterns.description: Persist state to localStorage with SSR safety and type-safe serialization.

patterns.name: useMediaQuery Hook
patterns.description: SSR-safe media query matching for responsive behavior in JavaScript.
